title: lophiolepis bornmuelleri
intro: Lophiolepis bornmuelleri, also known as the Himalayan tree fern, is a rare species of tree fern native to the Himalayas and Tibet. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as being used to treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of Lophiolepis bornmuelleri are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally consumed to promote overall well-being.
